content: Three criteria reliably predict when a phase coordinator needs depth-3 (sub-coordinators): (1) more than 3 distinct sub-area groups requiring different specialists, (2) more than 3 cross-cutting concerns affecting the phase, (3) more than 7 total specialists. Drafting was the strongest depth-3 case (4 cross-cutting + 5 specialists + creative/quality split). The 8-specialist threshold and 3-group threshold from exemplar patterns proved effective — no depth-3 coordinator was over-complex and no depth-2 coordinator was under-structured.
sourceEvidence: Depth decisions: concept-coordinator depth=2 '3 specialists is well under the 8-specialist threshold'; worldbuilding-coordinator depth=3 '5 distinct world-bible sub-areas exceed the 3-group threshold'; drafting-coordinator depth=3 'STRONGEST depth-3 case. 4 cross-cutting concerns'.

history.reason: Cold start — first observation from initial factory run
